{{Infobox character
| name = Gadrael
| aliases = Mantle of Gadrael
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|script-formations, warn}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, bind, burden}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Second Judge of the Abidan Court, Makiel’s loyal right hand, [[judge|Judge]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Titan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, second of the Court of Seven}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Abidan Court]], [[Abidan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[judge|Judge]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Gadrael Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Gadrael, also known as the [[Titan]], is the Second [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]] and serves as the loyal right hand to [[Makiel]], the [[Hound]]. He is a compact, muscular man with dark blue or grayish skin and rows of horns covering his scalp in place of hair. Clad in seamless white liquid armor, he possesses a [[Judge]]'s [[Mantle]] that flows from his shoulders like a cape of burning starfire. He is characterized by an incredibly firm, granite-like expression and a temperament defined by cold fury and intense seriousness; he is noted for his lack of humor and his absolute devotion to the [[Way]]. In combat and utility, Gadrael is regarded as nearly invincible, embodying the [[essence]] of defense. He utilizes the [[Shield of Gadrael]] (or the [[Shield of the Titan]]), a black circular buckler on his forearm that can expand into a massive, gleaming [[steel]] bulwark featuring red-hot veins. He is capable of generating translucent blue walls of force strong enough to intercept planet-destroying strikes without trembling. Beyond his defensive prowess, he has demonstrated the authority to bind others, reinforce complex magical defenses, and perform executions. His role involves maintaining order within the [[Abidan]], overseeing various sectors, and acting as a formidable guardian for those under his protection.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As a [[Judge]] and the Second [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]], Gadrael serves as the loyal right hand to [[Makiel]]. He carries a black buckler and wears the [[Mantle]] of Gadrael, which is a cape composed of pure starfire. Despite his formidable presence, he never smiles and operates under a mission defined by mercy.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gadrael]] is the Second [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]] and [[Makiel]]’s loyal right hand.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Mantle]] of [[Gadrael]] is a cape of pure starfire worn by [[Gadrael]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gadrael]] does not smile.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gadrael]] carries a black buckler.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gadrael]]'s mission is mercy.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gadrael]] is a compact and muscular man with dusky blue skin and tight-packed horns instead of hair.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Gadrael]] wears liquid-smooth white armor and a [[Judge]]'s [[Mantle]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Gadrael]] is someone [[Makiel]] might send.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Gadrael]]'s isolation has ended.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Judge]] known as the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As an [[Abidan]], Gadrael is a stone-faced figure among the seven of his kind. He possesses cartilage sturdier than most planets and is clad in smooth white armor. During the events involving the sealing of [[Asylum]], a previous generation of Gadrael utilized script-formations to secure the location. Carrying the [[Shield of the Titan]], a bulwark of gleaming [[steel]] with red-hot veins resembling molten metal, he successfully blocked a blow from the Scythe. Before his confrontation, Gadrael issued a warning to [[Suriel]] that she would eventually stand trial.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] had a second generation.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]]'s cartilage is sturdier than most planets.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] wears smooth white armor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] possesses the [[Shield of the Titan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Shield of the Titan]] is a bulwark of gleaming [[steel]] with red-hot veins like molten metal.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A previous generation of [[Gadrael]] set up script-formations to seal [[Asylum]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] warned [[Suriel]] that she will stand trial.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] is an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] took a blow from the Scythe on his shield.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gadrael]] is a stone-faced man among the seven [[Abidan]] figures.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Gadrael]] is the [[Titan]] who sealed [[Ozriel]]'s mouth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Gadrael]] reinforced the defenses around the [[Seat of the Accused]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Gadrael is a [[Titan]] and the second member of the [[Court of Seven]], characterized by grayish skin, short scalp spikes, and blue eyes that hold a spark of the [[Way]]. As an [[Abidan]] [[Judge]], he evaluated [[Lindon]]'s actions and found him innocent, though his focused attention on the man has complicated matters. Gadrael utilized his abilities to bind [[Lindon]] to a specific mission, preventing him from seeking more power, contacting his Division, or undermining world stability. Furthermore, he burdened [[Lindon]] with the weight of their cause and issued warnings that any betrayal would lead to censure or immediate execution. During his interactions, the [[Judge]] also discussed the possibility of relinquishing his seat on the [[Court]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Titan]] and the second of the [[Court of Seven]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] has grayish skin and short spikes on his scalp.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] can bind, burden, and warn others.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] binds [[Lindon]] to his mission, preventing him from seeking power beyond what he has, undermining world stability, or contacting his Division.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] burdens [[Lindon]] with the weight of their cause.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] warns [[Lindon]] and his associates that betrayal will result in execution or censure.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] has blue eyes containing a spark of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] has the authority to perform immediate executions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Judge]] whose attention on [[Lindon]] has complicated things.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is an [[Abidan]] who [[Lindon]] thought would act personally.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Judge]] who may punish the [[Abidan]] for breaking rules.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] judged [[Lindon]]'s actions and found him innocent.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] discussed giving up his seat on the [[Court]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is one of the [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“You will stand trial for this,” Gadrael warned Suriel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“All will be answered for,” that man said with icy calm. “You have cost us enough time already. Gadrael.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I bind you, I burden you, and I warn you.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I bind you to your mission. You may not seek power beyond what you have, you may not seek to undermine the stability of the world you inhabit, and you may not contact your Division.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“I burden you with the weight of our cause,” Gadrael continued.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Abidan Court]]
[[Category:Abidan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
